◎简　　介  

　　In the autobiographical I AM NANCY, the focus is squarely on Heather Langenkamp and her unique experience playing Wes Craven's legendary teen heroine Nancy Thompson. With tongue planted firmly in cheek, Heather asks the burning question: "Why Freddymania, and not Nancymania " After personally experiencing the Freddy Krueger marketing craze, the rise of horror convention fandom ...
